jobs.label: Cena 01 — Paisagem ao amanhecer
jobs.prompt: A breathtaking mountain landscape at dawn, mist rolling through valleys, first rays of sunlight painting the peaks in gold and pink, timelapse-style movement, cinematic wide shot.

jobs.label: Cena 02 — Extensão da paisagem
jobs.prompt: The sun rises fully above the mountain range, birds fly across the frame, the mist slowly dissipates revealing a lush green valley below.

jobs.label: Cena 03 — Personagem aparece no horizonte
jobs.prompt: A lone hiker silhouetted against the sunrise sky, walking on a mountain ridge trail, dramatic backlit composition, epic cinematic feel.

jobs.label: Cena 04 — Transição: zoom no rosto do personagem
jobs.prompt: [ZOOM_IN_CUT] Close-up of the hiker's determined face, sweat on their brow, eyes focused on the summit ahead, natural lighting.

jobs.label: Cena 05 — Acampamento: personagem descansa
jobs.prompt: The hiker sets up camp on a flat rocky ledge, unpacking a tent, warm late-afternoon light, mountains in the background, peaceful atmosphere.

jobs.label: Cena 06 — Extensão: fogueira à noite
jobs.prompt: A campfire crackling under a stunning starry night sky, the hiker sits beside the fire, embers floating upward, Milky Way visible overhead.

jobs.label: Cena 07 — Transição: panorâmica para o vale
jobs.prompt: [PAN_RIGHT_CUT] The camera pans from the campfire to reveal a vast illuminated valley town far below, twinkling lights in the darkness.

jobs.label: Cena 08 — Cume: chegada ao topo
jobs.prompt: The triumphant hiker reaches the mountain summit, arms raised in victory, 360-degree panoramic view of mountains and clouds below, golden hour, emotional moment.

jobs.label: Cena 09 — Extensão: contemplação no cume
jobs.prompt: The hiker sits on the summit boulder, gazing at the horizon as clouds drift by below, serene and reflective, wind gently moving their hair.

jobs.label: Cena 10 — Encerramento: narração do personagem
jobs.prompt: A hiker speaking to camera with the mountain summit visible behind them, warm smile, reflective tone, natural wind sound.

jobs.label: C01-A · Corredor — Estabelecimento
jobs.prompt: A modern school hallway on the first day of school. Bright LED lights reflect off polished floors. Digital schedule screens line the walls. One student stands studying an interactive map on her tablet while another walks confidently toward her. They almost collide. No words spoken — just a startled look and a quick sidestep. Anime-inspired soft shading, wide establishing shot, warm ambient light.

jobs.label: C01-B · Valen — 'Foi mal.'
jobs.prompt: A teenage girl, composed but slightly embarrassed, speaking a brief apology, direct gaze, school hallway background. Close-up shot.

jobs.label: C01-C · Lumi — 'Tudo bem… eu que estava parada no meio.'
jobs.prompt: A teenage girl with a gentle, relieved expression, speaking softly, slightly flustered but calm. Close-up shot, school hallway background.

jobs.label: C01-D · Valen — 'Primeiro dia?'
jobs.prompt: A teenage girl asking a curious, slightly amused question, direct gaze, subtle confident smirk. Close-up shot.

jobs.label: C01-E · Lumi — 'Dá pra perceber, né?'
jobs.prompt: A teenage girl responding with a shy, self-aware smile, slightly embarrassed but finding some humor in the situation. Close-up shot.

jobs.label: C01-F · Corredor — Plano de saída, olhar que fica
jobs.prompt: Two girls walking in opposite directions down a modern school hallway. Each glances back briefly before disappearing into the crowd. A quiet moment of curiosity and recognition. No words spoken between them — only a lingering look. Medium shot, soft warm light.

jobs.label: C02-A · Sala — Lumi hesita, senta ao lado de Valen
jobs.prompt: A modern digital classroom, most seats already taken. A girl pauses at the door scanning the room, then sits next to a student near the back who does not look up. No words spoken — two strangers sharing space in silence. Soft blue ambient glow from screens. Medium wide shot.

jobs.label: C02-B · Lumi — 'Você já entendeu essa parte?'
jobs.prompt: A student leaning slightly toward the person beside her, whispering, curious and cautious expression, blue classroom lighting. Close-up.

jobs.label: C02-C · Valen — 'Quase. Acho que é mais simples do que parece.'
jobs.prompt: A student responding thoughtfully, arms slightly crossed, measured tone, not quite opening up yet. Close-up, classroom background.

jobs.label: C02-D · Lumi — 'Ou mais complicado.'
jobs.prompt: A student responding with dry subtle humor, slight raise of an eyebrow, almost smiling.

jobs.label: C02-E · Valen — 'Espero que não.'
jobs.prompt: A student responding quietly, a flicker of vulnerability behind the composed expression, looking back at her screen.

jobs.label: C02-F · Sala — Primeiro silêncio cúmplice
jobs.prompt: Two students sitting side by side at a desk, both looking at their screens, subtly aware of each other. A quiet first connection. Blue digital glow, medium shot.

jobs.label: C03-A · Refeitório — Maya desenhando na fila
jobs.prompt: A modern school cafeteria with digital menu panels overhead. A girl stands in the lunch line completely absorbed in sketching on her tablet, oblivious to the movement around her. Warm overhead light. Medium shot.

jobs.label: C03-B · Lumi — 'Você desenhou isso agora?'
jobs.prompt: A girl leaning in, genuinely surprised and curious, eyes moving between the drawing and the artist. Warm cafeteria background.

jobs.label: C03-C · Maya — 'Sim… eu gosto de desenhar enquanto espero.'
jobs.prompt: A girl looking up from her drawing, slightly startled but gentle, holding her tablet close, soft voice.

jobs.label: C03-D · Valen — 'É um cachorro-robô?'
jobs.prompt: A student speaking from behind, deadpan expression, pretending not to be interested but clearly looking at the drawing. Dry curiosity.

jobs.label: C03-E · Maya — 'É. Ele parece abandonado… mas não devia estar.'
jobs.prompt: A girl speaking quietly, looking down at her drawing with a contemplative, gently melancholy expression. A genuine thought, not just small talk.

jobs.label: C03-F · Refeitório — Três juntos na fila, vínculo silencioso
jobs.prompt: Three students standing together in a cafeteria line, one showing the others a drawing on her tablet. An unexpected small connection. Warm overhead light, medium shot.

jobs.label: C04-A · Sala — Caio entra, analisa a sala, vê o lugar livre
jobs.prompt: A boy enters a busy digital classroom, pausing briefly at the entrance, scanning the room with quiet methodical eyes. He spots one available seat next to a small cluster of students. He walks toward it without hurry. Cool classroom lighting, medium shot.

jobs.label: C04-B · Caio — 'Está ocupado?'
jobs.prompt: A student asking calmly, polite and direct, neutral expression, slightly formal posture. No excess emotion.

jobs.label: C04-C · Maya — 'Não.'
jobs.prompt: A girl answering simply, brief and neutral, barely looking up from her tablet. One word, no fuss.

jobs.label: C04-D · Lumi — 'Você já mexeu nesse sistema antes?'
jobs.prompt: A student turning toward the newcomer with genuine curiosity, open and friendly expression, slightly eager.

jobs.label: C04-E · Caio — 'Um pouco… ele é mais intuitivo do que parece.'
jobs.prompt: A student responding thoughtfully, gesturing slightly toward a screen, matter-of-fact tone, naturally joining the conversation.

jobs.label: C04-F · Sala — Quatro mentes na mesma conversa
jobs.prompt: Four students around a shared workspace, each looking at screens, all engaged in the same conversation naturally. First moment as an accidental group. Cool blue classroom light, medium wide shot.

jobs.label: C05-A · Sala — Maya tenta escrever com o dedo, Valen observa
jobs.prompt: A student trying unsuccessfully to write on a digital tablet with her fingertip, frustrated and improvising. Another student nearby notices silently. Warm classroom light, close-medium shot.

jobs.label: C05-B · Maya — 'Acho que esqueci minha caneta…'
jobs.prompt: A student muttering to herself, slightly embarrassed, looking down at her tablet, voice trailing off.

jobs.label: C05-C · Valen — 'Pode usar essa.'
jobs.prompt: A student holding out a stylus pen, calm and direct, no big gesture, matter-of-fact kindness without making it a moment.

jobs.label: C05-D · Maya — 'Sério?'
jobs.prompt: A student looking up genuinely surprised, eyes warm, touched more than she expected by the small gesture.

jobs.label: C05-E · Valen — 'Depois você me devolve.'
jobs.prompt: A student saying this with a slight smirk, already looking back at her own screen, deflecting the warmth but clearly meaning it kindly.

jobs.label: C05-F · Sala — Maya escreve, Valen olha de volta discretamente
jobs.prompt: Two students at a desk. One writes with a borrowed stylus, focused. The other glances at her briefly then returns to her own screen. A quiet new bond. Warm classroom light, medium shot.

jobs.label: C06-A · Sala — Professor erra, silêncio estranho na sala
jobs.prompt: A classroom scene. A teacher at the front mispronounces a complex technical term, creating an awkward pause. Students exchange glances. Wide shot from behind the four students, their reactions visible. Classroom lighting.

jobs.label: C06-B · Lumi — segurando o riso
jobs.prompt: A girl pressing her hand over her mouth, eyes bright with suppressed laughter, shoulders shaking slightly. She is fighting it and losing. Close-up, soft classroom background.

jobs.label: C06-C · Caio — 'Você ouviu isso também, né?'
jobs.prompt: A student leaning in quietly, trying to keep a straight face, eyes slightly wide, whispering conspiratorially.

jobs.label: C06-D · Maya — 'Eu tentei não rir.'
jobs.prompt: A student responding in a hushed voice, already losing the battle with laughter, shoulders slightly raised, suppressed giggle.

jobs.label: C06-E · Valen — 'Falhou miseravelmente.'
jobs.prompt: A student delivering this with a deadpan face that slowly cracks into a genuine smile. Dry humor, warm eyes.

jobs.label: C06-F · Sala — Os quatro rindo juntos pela primeira vez
jobs.prompt: Four students in the back of a classroom sharing a quiet laugh, covering their mouths, leaning toward each other. A genuine shared moment. The silence between them is no longer strange. Warm classroom light, medium shot.

jobs.label: C07-A · Corredor — Os quatro caminham juntos sem combinar
jobs.prompt: Four students walking side by side in a school hallway after class, unhurried, no one walking ahead. A natural unspoken formation. Wide shot, warm corridor light, afternoon feel.

jobs.label: C07-B · Maya — 'Vocês também vão pra biblioteca?'
jobs.prompt: A student looking at the others while walking, slightly hopeful expression, open and inviting.

jobs.label: C07-C · Caio — 'Preciso terminar a atividade.'
jobs.prompt: A student answering directly, factual tone, still walking, slightly nods toward the direction ahead.

jobs.label: C07-D · Lumi — 'Eu queria ver os livros digitais novos.'
jobs.prompt: A student responding with quiet enthusiasm, eyes lighting up slightly, honest and unpretentious.

jobs.label: C07-E · Valen — 'Então vamos juntos.'
jobs.prompt: A student saying this simply, no drama, no special emphasis. Like it was already decided. Slight tilt of the head forward.

jobs.label: C07-F · Corredor — Quatro em linha, equilíbrio inconsciente
jobs.prompt: Four students walking side by side toward the library entrance, no one leading. Equal line, unhurried pace. A subtle visual balance. Warm hallway light, wide shot.

jobs.label: C08-A · Sala — Professora anuncia grupos, caos começa
jobs.prompt: A classroom erupts into movement as students scramble to form groups. The four students are already near each other, slightly apart from the chaos. They exchange quiet glances. Medium wide shot, classroom lighting.

jobs.label: C08-B · Valen — 'Já somos quatro.'
jobs.prompt: A student speaking the obvious truth calmly. The word 'somos' carries quiet weight. First time she includes the others in a sentence. Slight lift of the eyebrow.

jobs.label: C08-C · Caio — 'Facilita bastante.'
jobs.prompt: A student responding practically, understated agreement, small satisfied nod. No excess.

jobs.label: C08-D · Maya — 'Melhor do que procurar pela sala inteira.'
jobs.prompt: A student smiling genuinely, glancing at the chaotic classroom around them. A warm, spontaneous reaction.

jobs.label: C08-E · Sala — Os quatro como grupo, plano fechado
jobs.prompt: Four students settled at a shared workspace, calm and together while the rest of the classroom scrambles. They belong here. Medium close shot, soft focus on background chaos.

jobs.label: C09-A · Marquise — Chuva começa, eles param
jobs.prompt: Four students stopped under a school entrance overhang as heavy rain begins. The city street outside glistens. Digital signs reflect in puddles. A comfortable, unhurried silence. Wide shot, cool blue-grey light.

jobs.label: C09-B · Maya — 'Eu gosto do som da chuva.'
jobs.prompt: A student speaking softly, watching the rain fall outside, a quiet smile, peaceful and genuine.

jobs.label: C09-C · Caio — 'A previsão não falava nisso.'
jobs.prompt: A student responding factually, glancing at his phone then at the sky, calm and completely unbothered.

jobs.label: C09-D · Lumi — 'Às vezes a previsão erra.'
jobs.prompt: A student responding gently, eyes following reflections on the wet street, thoughtful and unhurried.

jobs.label: C09-E · Valen — 'Melhor esperar juntos.'
jobs.prompt: A student speaking simply, looking straight ahead at the rain. A rare, quiet warmth behind the usual composure.

jobs.label: C09-F · Marquise — Silêncio confortável, ninguém quer ir
jobs.prompt: Four students standing shoulder to shoulder under a rain shelter, watching the rain. No one moves. City lights begin to glow in the wet evening. Cinematic medium shot, quiet mood.

jobs.label: C10-A · Portão — Chuva diminui, último momento do dia
jobs.prompt: School gate at dusk. The rain fades to a light drizzle. Four students walk toward the exit together, the school day finally ending. Warm street lights glowing softly. Wide shot, golden-hour tones.

jobs.label: C10-B · Lumi — 'Foi um dia legal.'
jobs.prompt: A student speaking genuinely, soft and honest, looking at the others with warm, open eyes.

jobs.label: C10-C · Caio — 'Foi mesmo.'
jobs.prompt: A student agreeing simply, no extra words, sincere nod, looking ahead. Two words that mean it.

jobs.label: C10-D · Maya — 'Não foi tão assustador quanto eu achei que seria.'
jobs.prompt: A student speaking with quiet relief and genuine surprise at herself, slight laugh in her voice, looking at her companions.

jobs.label: C10-E · Valen — 'A gente sobreviveu ao primeiro dia. Já é um começo.'
jobs.prompt: A student speaking with dry warmth, a real smile finally breaking through. The word 'a gente' belongs to all four of them now.

jobs.label: C10-F · Portão — Plano final, a pausa antes de ir
jobs.prompt: Four students at the school gate at dusk. No one rushes. A long quiet beat as the city glows behind them. Final wide cinematic shot, warm soft focus, golden light.

jobs.label: Cena 01 — Escola: A Mesa Vazia da Piva
jobs.audio_text: Era segunda-feira. A mesa favorita da Piva, junto à janela, estava vazia pela primeira vez.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style 2030 futuristic school courtyard at lunchtime, group of teenage friends at outdoor table looking around with concerned expressions, empty corner with garden nearby, warm golden afternoon light, holographic signs on school walls, detailed vibrant background
jobs.prompt: Wide establishing shot of a futuristic 2030 school courtyard at lunchtime. Students seated at outdoor tables with food trays. A familiar corner near a garden is unusually empty. Valen, Lumi, Maya and Caio sit together looking around expectantly, scanning the area. Warm afternoon sunlight, anime style, slow camera dolly forward, vibrant colors, gentle breeze through the trees.

jobs.label: Cena 02 — Maya: Close de Preocupação
jobs.audio_text: Algo estava errado. Maya sentia isso.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style close-up portrait of teenage girl Maya Flores, worried and puzzled expression scanning surroundings, biting her lip slightly, soft warm afternoon school background blurred, detailed empathetic facial features, vibrant colors
jobs.prompt: Close-up shot of Maya Flores at the school table, scanning the area with a worried and puzzled expression, biting her lower lip. Her eyes move slowly across the courtyard. Soft afternoon light, anime style, subtle camera push-in to her face, emotional and empathetic close-up.

jobs.label: Cena 03 — Maya Fala: 'A Piva não veio hoje'
jobs.audio_text: Gente... vocês notaram que a Piva não veio hoje? Eu fiquei aqui esperando ela desde que a gente sentou, olhei pra todo lado e nada. Ela nunca faltou um único dia desde que a gente começou a estudar aqui. Nunca mesmo. Isso tá me preocupando.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style close-up of teenage girl Maya speaking with worried expression, leaning forward at school table, hands gesturing, wide concerned eyes, blurred school outdoor cafeteria background, warm afternoon light, detailed emotional facial expression
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Maya Flores speaking with genuine worry to her friends at the school table, leaning forward with hands gesturing expressively. Her eyes are wide and concerned. Warm school courtyard background, soft natural light, camera slightly angled up toward her face, emotional and caring expression.

jobs.label: Cena 04 — Lumi Responde: 'Ela tem um relógio interno melhor que o meu'
jobs.audio_text: É verdade, Maya, eu também tava estranhando. A Piva aparece todo dia certinho, quase no mesmo horário. Tipo, ela tem um relógio interno melhor do que o meu! Ontem ela veio, antes de ontem também. Hoje não veio e isso realmente me preocupa bastante.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style close-up portrait of teenage girl Lumi Byte with calm but concerned expression, nodding thoughtfully at school table, gesturing with hand while speaking, soft warm afternoon light, blurred school background, detailed empathetic features
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Lumi Byte nodding thoughtfully and speaking to her friends at the school table. Her expression is calm but clearly concerned, analytical yet empathetic. She gestures with her hand as she speaks, looking around briefly. Soft afternoon light, anime style, steady camera.

jobs.label: Cena 05 — Caio Analisa: 'Padrão completamente alterado'
jobs.audio_text: Padrão completamente alterado. Ela nunca faltou, nem nos dias de chuva, nem quando tinha obra barulhenta aqui do lado. Se ela não veio até agora, é porque alguma coisa diferente aconteceu. Capivaras são criaturas de hábito fortíssimo. O comportamento dela mudou por um motivo concreto.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style close-up of teenage boy Caio Luz with calm analytical expression, arms crossed, focused strategic eyes, slightly leaning back at school table, blurred school outdoor background, warm afternoon light, detailed composed facial expression
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Caio Luz looking serious and thoughtful, arms crossed, speaking with measured calm confidence. He leans back slightly in his chair, eyes focused and analytical. School courtyard with afternoon light behind him. Anime style, steady camera, strategic expression.

jobs.label: Cena 06 — Valen Decide: 'Vamos atrás dela agora'
jobs.audio_text: Então tá decidido. A gente vai atrás dela agora, não dá pra ficar aqui esperando. O lago fica do lado da escola e é o lugar favorito dela, todo mundo sabe disso. Deixa a comida aqui, isso pode esperar. Levanta, vamos todos juntos!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style close-up of teenage girl Valen standing up decisively from school table, fierce protective leadership expression, hands planted on table, commanding pose, school outdoor background, warm afternoon light, dynamic powerful energy, vibrant colors
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Valen standing up from the table with fierce energy and decisive leadership, speaking to her friends with a determined protective expression. She plants her hands on the table as she rises. School courtyard background, warm light, anime style, low camera angle looking up at her commanding pose.

jobs.label: Cena 07 — Grupo Sai da Escola em Direção ao Lago
jobs.audio_text: Sem hesitar, os quatro deixaram tudo para trás e foram em direção ao lago.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style wide shot, group of four teenage friends walking purposefully through school gate toward forested lake path, determined concerned expressions, late afternoon golden light with long shadows, detailed school building and trees in background, vibrant colors
jobs.prompt: Wide shot of the group — Valen, Lumi, Maya, Caio — walking with purpose through the school gate toward a forested lake path. Late afternoon light casts long shadows behind them. Trees sway gently. Anime style, camera tracks alongside from slight front angle, urgent and determined pace.

jobs.label: Cena 08 — Caminho: Maya Fala do Vínculo com a Piva
jobs.audio_text: Sabe, a Piva é tipo... ela faz parte da nossa rotina de um jeito que a gente nem percebeu quando aconteceu. Toda vez que alguém tava passando mal ou com um dia ruim, ela aparecia do nada e ficava do lado. Ela sente quando a gente precisa. Ela é especial demais.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style medium shot, teenage girl Maya walking on tree-lined path toward lake, hugging herself with worried fond expression, speaking emotionally, dappled afternoon sunlight through leaves, warm earthy forest path colors, emotional atmosphere
jobs.prompt: Medium shot of Maya walking among her friends along a tree-lined path toward the lake, speaking emotionally as she walks. She hugs herself slightly, visibly worried but reminiscing fondly. Dappled sunlight through trees, anime style, camera walks alongside her, gentle fluid movement.

jobs.label: Cena 09 — Caminho: Lumi Tranquiliza Maya
jobs.audio_text: Com certeza ela tá bem, Maya. Capivaras são animais muito tranquilos e muito espertos. A Piva conhece esse lago melhor do que qualquer um de nós. Talvez ela só precisava de um dia diferente por algum motivo que a gente ainda não sabe. Mas a gente vai descobrir, tô certa disso.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style medium close-up, teenage girl Lumi walking on tree-lined path, turning toward friend with warm reassuring smile, hand touching friend's shoulder, gentle understanding eyes, dappled forest sunlight, soft warm colors, supportive caring atmosphere
jobs.prompt: Medium close-up of Lumi walking alongside on the path, turning toward Maya with a warm reassuring smile, speaking gently and confidently. Her eyes are soft and understanding, one hand lightly touching Maya's shoulder as they walk. Dappled sunlight through trees, anime style, walking camera motion.

jobs.label: Cena 10 — Caminho: Caio Planeja a Busca
jobs.audio_text: O lago fica a uns duzentos metros daqui. Capivaras geralmente ficam na beira da água ou embaixo de vegetação densa perto do lago. Se a gente se dividir em dois grupos e varrer a margem pelos dois lados, a chance de encontrar ela muito mais rápido é alta. Precisamos ser sistemáticos.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style medium shot from behind, teenage boy Caio walking ahead on forest path, pointing toward distant lake through trees, afternoon sunlight glinting on water, strategic focused posture, detailed forest environment, determined atmosphere
jobs.prompt: Medium shot of Caio walking slightly ahead of the group, scanning the environment analytically, pointing toward the lake visible in the distance through trees. His expression is focused and strategic, formulating a plan as he speaks. Afternoon light glinting off distant water. Anime style, camera dollies forward behind him.

jobs.label: Cena 11 — Chegando ao Lago: Panorâmica Épica
jobs.audio_text: O lago se abria diante deles, vasto e quieto. Em algum lugar entre as pedras e a vegetação, a Piva esperava.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style wide cinematic shot, four teenage friends arriving at beautiful shimmering lake shore, golden afternoon light on water, lush trees and reeds surrounding the lake, friends looking around with determined awe, breathtaking natural landscape, vibrant warm colors
jobs.prompt: Wide cinematic shot of the group arriving at the edge of a beautiful shimmering lake. The water glows in afternoon light, surrounded by lush trees and tall reeds. The four friends stop at the bank, looking around in awe and determination. Camera slowly pans across the stunning lake landscape. Anime style, breathtaking golden hour environment.

jobs.label: Cena 12 — Valen Divide o Grupo
jobs.audio_text: Ok, vamos fazer assim: eu e o Caio vamos pela margem esquerda, do lado das pedras grandes lá no fundo. Maya, você vai com a Lumi pela direita, perto dos juncos altos. A gente se encontra do outro lado do lago. Qualquer coisa que encontrar, grita ou manda mensagem. Vamos com cuidado pra não assustar ela!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style medium shot, teenage girl Valen at lake shore giving directions, pointing left and right with leadership energy, determined expression, beautiful lake and reeds in background, golden afternoon light, dynamic confident posture, vibrant colors
jobs.prompt: Medium shot of Valen standing confidently at the lake shore, facing her friends and gesturing left and right along the shore as she divides the group into teams. Her leadership is natural and energetic. Lake and reeds behind her, golden light, anime style, dynamic confident pose.

jobs.label: Cena 13 — Maya Chama: 'Piva! Cadê você?'
jobs.audio_text: Piva! Piiiiva! Cadê você, menina? A gente tá aqui, pode aparecer! Olha, até esquecemos a sua comida favorita na escola de tanto que estávamos preocupados, mas a gente volta buscar pra você, eu juro! Só aparece aqui pra gente saber que você tá bem!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style medium shot, teenage girl Maya moving carefully through tall lakeside reeds, hands cupped around mouth calling out, worried hopeful expression, afternoon light filtering through reeds, water reflections visible, emotional searching atmosphere
jobs.prompt: Medium shot of Maya carefully moving through tall reeds along the lake shore, calling out with her hands cupped around her mouth. She looks worried but hopeful, moving slowly through the vegetation. Afternoon light filters through reeds, water reflections shimmer. Anime style, emotional searching atmosphere.

jobs.label: Cena 14 — Lumi Para: 'Olha ali perto das pedras!'
jobs.audio_text: Maya... para. Fica quieta um segundo. Olha ali, perto das pedras grandes do outro lado. Tô vendo um movimento diferente. Parece... parece ela! Não se mexa rápido, não faz barulho, vamos devagar pra não assustar!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style close-up of teenage girl Lumi stopping suddenly, wide alert eyes, gently grabbing companion's arm, pointing carefully toward rocks across lake, expression shifting from worry to recognition, lake background with large rocks, warm afternoon light, tense atmosphere
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Lumi stopping suddenly, eyes going wide and alert, spotting something across the lake near large rocks. She gently grabs her companion's arm, pointing carefully. Her expression transforms from worry to intense recognition. Lake background with rocks, warm afternoon light, anime style, tension building.

jobs.label: Cena 15 — Revelação: Piva com seus Filhotes
jobs.audio_text: E ali, entre as pedras grandes, estava a Piva. Não estava perdida. Estava sendo mãe.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style wide cinematic reveal, calm mother capybara resting on lake shore rocks surrounded by tiny adorable baby capybaras, some nursing, some playing, golden afternoon sunlight shimmering on water, lush green background, warm emotional scene, beautiful nature setting
jobs.prompt: Cinematic wide reveal shot — a calm adult capybara resting peacefully on sun-warmed rocks at the lake edge, surrounded by several tiny adorable baby capybaras. The mother nurses and grooms her young. Golden afternoon light shimmers on the water around them. Anime style, slow dramatic reveal pan, warm emotional lighting, beautiful nature scene.

jobs.label: Cena 16 — Maya Explode de Alegria: 'Ela teve filhotes!'
jobs.audio_text: Ela teve filhotes! Lumi, você tá vendo isso? Ela teve filhotes! É por isso que ela não foi à escola hoje, ela tava aqui no lago cuidando dos seus bebês! Olha quantos são! São tantos! Meu Deus... que coisa mais linda e mais especial do mundo inteiro!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style extreme close-up, teenage girl Maya with both hands covering mouth, eyes wide and filling with happy tears, overwhelmed joyful expression barely contained, warm golden light on face, deeply emotional moment, tears glistening, beautiful lighting
jobs.prompt: Extreme close-up of Maya's face with an overwhelmed joyful expression, both hands covering her mouth, eyes filling with tears of happiness. She whispers with pure amazement, barely able to contain herself. Warm golden light, anime style, deeply emotional close-up, tears glistening.

jobs.label: Cena 17 — Lumi Chama Valen e Caio
jobs.audio_text: Eu já tô mandando mensagem pro Caio e pra Valen agora! Eles precisam ver isso! Gente, encontramos a Piva! Ela tá nas pedras do lado leste com os filhotes! Venham rápido, mas em silêncio absoluto, tá? Não façam barulho nenhum!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style medium shot, teenage girl Lumi typing excitedly on holographic wrist device, huge grin while trying to stay quiet, lake and reeds background, warm golden light, contained excited energy, futuristic 2030 wrist interface glowing
jobs.prompt: Medium shot of Lumi excitedly but quietly typing on her futuristic holographic wrist device, sending a message to the group. She looks up with a huge grin, containing her excitement so as not to scare the capybara. Lake and reeds behind her, warm golden light, anime style, excited restrained energy.

jobs.label: Cena 18 — Valen e Caio Correm Pelo Lago
jobs.audio_text: Rápido, Caio! Precisamos ver isso agora!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style dynamic wide shot, teenage girl Valen and teenage boy Caio sprinting along beautiful lake shore, excited breathless expressions, slowing down as they approach, exchanging quick glance, golden afternoon lake reflections, dynamic motion blur, vibrant exciting energy
jobs.prompt: Dynamic wide shot of Valen and Caio sprinting along the lake shore toward the others, breathless and excited. As they get closer they slow down, remembering to be quiet, exchanging a quick glance. Beautiful lake scenery, golden hour light, anime style, dynamic camera tracking their run from the side, motion blur on their feet.

jobs.label: Cena 19 — Valen: 'Ela soube exatamente o que fazer'

American flag planted in the distance. Dust floats in slow motion. Emotional slow camera pull-back revealing the vast lonely Moon landscape. Anime cinematic style, silver gray and deep black palette, historic grandeur.

jobs.label: Cena 10 — Encerramento: O Próximo Capítulo da Lua
jobs.audio_text: Que aula incrível foi essa, turma! Hoje aprendemos que a Lua é nosso satélite natural, descobrimos as fases lunares, a gravidade lunar, o poder das marés, e vivemos a história épica dos astronautas que pisaram lá. Mas a história da Lua ainda não acabou! No outro dia, vamos aprender algo ainda mais surpreendente: como está sendo a vivência das comunidades que hoje vivem na Lua! Até a próxima, turma!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style illustration, futuristic classroom end-of-class scene with all students sitting with inspired joyful expressions, friendly robot teacher facing forward warmly, soft Moon hologram still glowing in background, classroom windows showing hint of Moon in afternoon sky, warm amber and cool blue mixed lighting, wide group shot, sense of wonder discovery and anticipation

name: ep08 - A Terra, mar e os Continentes

jobs.label: Cena 01 — A Aula Começa: Bem-vindos ao Planeta Terra
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z diz: Bom dia, turma! Hoje vamos embarcar em uma viagem pelo planeta mais incrível do universo — o nosso lar: a Terra! Vão precisar prender a respiração!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style 2030 futuristic classroom with circular holographic table, teenage students seated around it, sleek robot teacher activating a large glowing blue-green Earth hologram floating above the table, vibrant classroom lighting, detailed futuristic school interior, wide shot composition.
jobs.prompt: Wide establishing shot of a futuristic INETUSX classroom, circular holographic table glowing in the center, students Lumi, Maya seated around it. PIX-Z robot stands at the front panel, raising both arms as a giant holographic Earth expands above the table, blue-green light fills the room dramatically. Excited student reactions, slow camera push-in, anime style, warm morning ambient light.

jobs.label: Cena 02 — Vista do Espaço: O Planeta Azul
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z narra: Vendo daqui do espaço, a Terra parece uma bola azul brilhante flutuando no nada. Ela tem 4 bilhões e 500 milhões de anos — e é o único planeta que conhecemos com vida! Incrível, né?
jobs.image_prompt: Planet Earth seen from outer space, blue oceans, green-brown continents, glowing thin atmosphere, black starry background, holographic educational data overlays, futuristic visualization aesthetic, cinematic anime illustration, epic scale composition.
jobs.prompt: Cinematic view of Earth from deep space, the planet slowly rotating, blue oceans dominating, green-brown continents visible, thin luminous atmosphere at edges, black starry void background. Holographic data streams appear around the globe showing numbers and labels. Camera slowly zooms in from outer space toward the planet surface. Epic scale, anime-inspired, dramatic lighting.

jobs.label: Cena 03 — Lumi Pergunta: Como a Terra Foi Formada?
jobs.audio_text: Lumi diz: PIX-Z, mas como exatamente a Terra foi formada? Ela sempre existiu assim, como uma bola azul linda?
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style teenage girl with empathetic observant expression raising hand eagerly, 2030 futuristic INETUSX classroom background with glowing blue holographic Earth behind her, warm ambient light, detailed curious face expression, close-up character illustration.
jobs.prompt: Close-up shot of Lumi inside the futuristic INETUSX classroom, sitting at the circular holographic table, the blue-green Earth hologram glowing behind her. She raises her hand enthusiastically with a curious and excited expression, leaning slightly forward, eyes bright, anime style soft lighting, warm classroom ambient.

jobs.label: Cena 04 — PIX-Z Explica: O Nascimento da Terra
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z explica: Boa pergunta, Lumi! Há 4,5 bilhões de anos, nuvens de gás e poeira cósmica giravam no espaço. A gravidade foi puxando tudo para o centro — rochas se colidiram, o calor foi imenso, e assim, aos poucos, nasceu nossa Terra!
jobs.image_prompt: Sleek futuristic robot teacher gesturing dramatically at a holographic space nebula simulation showing planet Earth forming — swirling gas clouds, asteroid collisions, glowing proto-planet coalescing, futuristic classroom background with students watching, anime educational illustration, vibrant blue and orange nebula colors.
jobs.prompt: Medium shot of PIX-Z robot standing beside the holographic Earth projection, which morphs into a cosmic nebula simulation showing gas and dust clouds swirling, asteroids colliding, proto-Earth forming from cosmic debris. Dynamic holographic animation surrounds PIX-Z. Classroom visible in the background with students leaning forward in awe. Educational and energetic tone, anime style.

jobs.label: Cena 05 — As Camadas da Terra Reveladas
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z diz: Agora vamos entrar na Terra! Ela tem quatro camadas: a crosta — onde vivemos e pisamos — o manto, enorme e rochoso, o núcleo externo que é líquido, e lá no centro, o núcleo interno sólido!
jobs.image_prompt: Futuristic classroom with glowing holographic Earth cross-section splitting open to reveal colorful geological layers — brown crust, dark red mantle, orange liquid outer core, white solid inner core at center, robot teacher pointing at layers, students leaning in awe, anime educational illustration, detailed layered composition.
jobs.prompt: PIX-Z activates a detailed cross-section hologram of Earth's interior that dramatically splits open revealing colorful layers — brown outer crust, dark red mantle, glowing molten orange outer core, brilliant yellow-white solid inner core at center. Students lean in fascinated. Slow camera zoom into the hologram layers, classroom setting, dramatic educational lighting, anime style.

jobs.label: Cena 06 — Maya Pergunta: Quanto Calor Tem o Núcleo?
jobs.audio_text: Maya diz: Mas... que temperatura tem lá dentro? Olhando aquele núcleo brilhando assim, deve ser quente demais pra qualquer coisa sobreviver!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style teenage girl with sensitive creative expression, wide eyes reflecting orange-red glow of holographic Earth cross-section, futuristic classroom background, amazed and slightly alarmed face with hands pressed together, warm dramatic lighting, close-up detailed anime character illustration.
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Maya inside the futuristic INETUSX classroom, eyes wide staring at the glowing cross-section hologram, the orange-red core light reflecting on her face. She turns toward PIX-Z with a fascinated and slightly frightened expression, mouth slightly open, pressing her hands together nervously. Soft anime shading, warm dramatic colors.

jobs.label: Cena 07 — PIX-Z Revela: Temperaturas Extremas do Interior
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z responde: Ótima pergunta, Maya! O manto tem até 1.300 graus. O núcleo externo chega a 4.000 graus — quente o suficiente para derreter ferro! E o núcleo interno atinge 5.700 graus. Mas a pressão lá dentro é tão absurda que o ferro permanece sólido mesmo assim!
jobs.image_prompt: Futuristic robot teacher pointing at glowing Earth interior cross-section hologram with floating temperature labels — mantle 1300°C orange, outer core 4000°C red-orange glow, inner core 5700°C intense yellow-white pulse, students in background with shocked expressions, futuristic INETUSX classroom, anime educational illustration.
jobs.prompt: PIX-Z stands beside the glowing Earth cross-section hologram, holographic temperature data appears floating next to each layer in fiery orange and red numbers. The inner core pulses with intense yellow-white light as temperature labels highlight 5700°C. PIX-Z extends its arm pointing dramatically at the innermost core. Anime style, educational clarity, students visible in background reacting with shock.

jobs.label: Cena 08 — Caio Questiona: Qual o Tamanho da Terra?
jobs.audio_text: Caio diz: PIX-Z, mas afinal — qual é o tamanho exato da Terra? Qual é o seu diâmetro? E a circunferência? Tenho curiosidade nos números reais.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style teenage boy with calm analytical expression, arms crossed studying holographic data display in 2030 futuristic INETUSX classroom, soft blue light from holograms illuminating his face, curious strategic look directed upward at teacher, close-up detailed anime character illustration.
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Caio at the holographic classroom table, calm and analytical expression, studying data on the holographic display in front of him. He looks up toward PIX-Z with a calculated and curious expression, one eyebrow slightly raised, arms crossed in thoughtful posture. Soft blue holographic light illuminates his face. Anime style, composed intellectual tone.

jobs.label: Cena 09 — PIX-Z Apresenta os Números Gigantes da Terra
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z diz: Os números são impressionantes! O diâmetro da Terra é de 12.742 quilômetros. A circunferência no equador tem mais de 40 mil quilômetros — se você andasse em linha reta o dia inteiro, levaria mais de um ano pra dar uma volta! E ela pesa 6 quintilhões de toneladas!
jobs.image_prompt: Holographic Earth rotating above futuristic circular holographic table surrounded by floating glowing scientific data — 12,742 km diameter scale bar, 40,075 km equator circumference, 5.97×10²⁴ kg mass label, robot teacher pointing at numbers, four students watching in awe, futuristic INETUSX classroom, anime educational illustration.
jobs.prompt: The holographic Earth rotates slowly above the classroom table while PIX-Z projects infographic data around the globe — a scale bar showing 12,742 km diameter glows in electric blue, circumference at equator 40,075 km, mass notation in scientific notation. Wide shot showing all students engaged and amazed. Camera orbits the hologram slowly. Anime educational style, dynamic layout.

jobs.label: Cena 10 — Valen Pergunta: E os Oceanos? Onde Termina o Fundo?
jobs.audio_text: Valen diz: A Terra tem muita água — olhando assim do espaço, parece mais oceano do que terra! Onde é o ponto mais fundo de tudo? Quanto fundo vai o oceano?
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style teenage girl with determined confident expression, leaning forward boldly at futuristic holographic table, pointing at glowing blue ocean regions on holographic Earth model, 2030 INETUSX classroom background, vibrant warm lighting, assertive pose, close-up detailed illustration.
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Valen in the futuristic INETUSX classroom, confident and energetic posture, leaning forward on the holographic table, eyes bright with bold curiosity, pointing at the blue ocean areas on the holographic Earth with an assertive gesture, competitive expression. Warm classroom lighting, anime style.

jobs.label: Cena 11 — Mergulho Abissal: A Fossa das Marianas
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z narra: O ponto mais fundo da Terra é a Fossa das Marianas, no Oceano Pacífico — tem 11.034 metros de profundidade! É mais fundo do que o Monte Everest é alto! Lá embaixo, a pressão é 1.100 vezes maior do que aqui na superfície. Praticamente nada sobrevive.
jobs.image_prompt: Deep ocean abyss descent scene — extreme darkness with bioluminescent blue-green particles, abyssal floor with volcanic vents and sediment visible below, holographic depth indicator showing 11,034m Mariana Trench label, eerie atmospheric pressure visual effects, cinematic scale, anime-inspired detailed illustration.
jobs.prompt: Dramatic descent into deep ocean darkness — camera moves slowly downward through dark blue water, bioluminescent creatures float past, pressure effects visible as particle distortion increases, the abyssal ocean floor comes into view far below with sediment and volcanic vents glowing faintly. Holographic depth scale appears showing 11,034 meters label. Cinematic, eerie, awe-inspiring, anime-inspired realism.

jobs.label: Cena 12 — Lumi Reage: Espantada com o Fundo do Mar
jobs.audio_text: Lumi diz: 11 mil metros... é impossível imaginar isso! Um lugar que a luz do sol nunca chega, onde a pressão esmaga tudo. Quantos mistérios ainda devem existir lá no fundo do mar que a gente nunca descobriu?
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style teenage girl with empathetic amazed expression, wide eyes reflecting deep blue holographic ocean glow, both hands pressed on futuristic holographic table, jaw slightly open in awe, 2030 INETUSX classroom warm ambient light, genuine surprised emotional reaction, close-up detailed anime illustration.
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Lumi inside the futuristic INETUSX classroom, her face illuminated by the deep blue holographic ocean simulation glowing on the table. Jaw slightly dropped in awe, she presses both hands gently on the table surface, eyes wide, shaking her head slowly in disbelief, then a warm empathetic smile forms. Soft classroom ambient, anime style, genuine emotional reaction.

jobs.label: Cena 13 — PIX-Z Mostra a Pangeia: Um Único Continente
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z diz: Mas os continentes nem sempre foram separados assim! Há 300 milhões de anos, toda a terra do planeta formava UM SÓ continente — a Pangeia! Com o tempo, as placas tectônicas foram se movendo — bem devagar, centímetros por ano — e os continentes foram se afastando até chegar onde estão hoje!
jobs.image_prompt: Holographic Earth time-lapse animation showing continents drifting backward and merging into Pangaea supercontinent, all landmasses connected forming one giant continent, single ocean Panthalassa surrounding it, holographic geological time arrows, futuristic INETUSX classroom, robot teacher gesturing, students in awe, anime educational illustration.
jobs.prompt: PIX-Z manipulates the holographic Earth to rewind geological time — a time-lapse animation shows the current seven continents slowly sliding back together over hundreds of millions of years, merging into the ancient supercontinent Pangaea surrounded by one giant ocean Panthalassa. Students watch in fascination. Wide classroom shot, holographic time arrows indicate geological scale. Anime style, historically epic.

jobs.label: Cena 14 — Maya Entusiasmada: O Quebra-Cabeça dos Continentes
jobs.audio_text: Maya diz: É tipo um quebra-cabeça gigante! Olha aqui — se você pegar a América do Sul e deslizar assim, as bordas encaixam quase que perfeitamente na costa da África! Como a gente nunca percebeu isso antes?
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style creative teenage girl tracing glowing continent outlines with her finger on futuristic holographic table, artistic glowing trace effect shows South America and Africa coastlines matching up like puzzle pieces, excited passionate expression, 2030 INETUSX classroom warm lighting, detailed close-up anime illustration.
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Maya in the futuristic INETUSX classroom, face lit up with creative excitement, she traces the outline of continents on the holographic table surface with her fingertip, the contact creates a glowing digital drawing effect matching South America and Africa's coastlines. She smiles widely with artistic wonder. Anime style, warm soft light, creative passionate moment.

jobs.label: Cena 15 — Caio Localiza: Onde Estamos no Planeta?
jobs.audio_text: Caio diz: E nós estamos aqui — na América do Sul! O Brasil ocupa quase metade do continente inteiro. E a gente tem a maior floresta tropical do mundo, a Amazônia, que influencia o clima de todo o planeta. Isso é muito poder de responsabilidade!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style teenage boy standing confidently at futuristic holographic table, pointing at South America highlighted in bright yellow on rotating holographic Earth globe, Brazil outlined prominently, robot teacher nodding approval beside him, 2030 INETUSX classroom, strategic proud academic pose, detailed anime illustration.
jobs.prompt: Medium shot of Caio standing up from the holographic table, pointing precisely at South America on the rotating holographic Earth globe, Brazil highlights in bright yellow glow where he points. PIX-Z nods approvingly. Classroom visible around them, strategic confident academic gesture. Anime style, clear educational framing, proud analytical stance.

jobs.label: Cena 16 — As Maiores Montanhas do Planeta
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z narra: Agora as maiores montanhas! O Monte Everest, no Himalaia, é o pico mais alto da Terra — com 8.849 metros acima do nível do mar! Na América do Sul, os Andes são a cordilheira mais longa do mundo inteiro, com 7.500 quilômetros de extensão!
jobs.image_prompt: Epic cinematic aerial view of Himalayan mountain range at golden sunrise, Mount Everest towering as highest peak with snow and ice reflecting golden light, dramatic cloud formations far below the summit, holographic altitude data 8,849m overlaid, scale comparison bar, anime-inspired realistic dramatic illustration.

Scale comparison hologram appears beside the mountain with altitude label at 8,849 meters. Epic composition, wide-angle drone-like camera movement, awe-inspiring atmosphere, anime-inspired cinematic realism.

jobs.label: Cena 17 — Valen Reage: Impressionada Pelas Montanhas
jobs.audio_text: Valen diz: Oito mil e oitocentos metros?! Cara, eu canso de subir dois lances de escada! Como alguém consegue chegar lá no topo desse negócio? Tem que ser corajoso demais!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style teenage girl with exaggerated awe and comedic reaction, leaning dramatically back in futuristic classroom chair, eyes wide looking at holographic scale comparison of tiny human figure beside Mount Everest towering above, jaw dropped in disbelief then breaking into laughter, 2030 INETUSX classroom, vibrant warm lighting, expressive anime illustration.
jobs.prompt: Close-up of Valen in the futuristic INETUSX classroom, watching the Himalayan hologram fade and be replaced by a scale comparison showing an Everest-sized mountain next to a tiny human figure. Valen's eyes go wide, she leans back dramatically in her chair with an overwhelmed expression, then bursts into genuine surprised laughter. Anime style, comedic-awe reaction, warm classroom ambient.

jobs.label: Cena 18 — Os Polos: Ártico e Antártida
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z diz: E nos polos da Terra vivemos os ambientes mais extremos! O Ártico ao norte é um oceano congelado — com ursos polares e gelo flutuante. A Antártida ao sul é um continente inteiro coberto de gelo! Tem 26 milhões de quilômetros cúbicos de gelo armazenado. Se tudo derreter, o nível do mar sobe 60 metros!
jobs.image_prompt: Arctic polar landscape with endless white ice sheets, green-purple aurora borealis overhead, extreme cold atmosphere with frost mist and wind, cinematic wide shot, Antarctic ice mountain silhouettes visible at horizon, educational holographic data overlay showing polar ice volume, dramatic natural beauty, anime-inspired detailed illustration.

Then a slow pan reveals Antarctic ice mountains rising dramatically. Holographic data about polar ice volume appears overlaid. PIX-Z narrates. Anime-inspired epic natural scenery, desolate beauty.

jobs.label: Cena 19 — O Giro da Terra: Dia, Noite e Estações
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z explica: A Terra gira em torno de si mesma uma vez a cada 24 horas — é assim que temos o dia e a noite! Mas ela também está inclinada 23,5 graus. Por causa dessa inclinação, temos as quatro estações do ano! E ao redor do Sol? Ela leva 365 dias para completar uma volta — exatamente um ano!
jobs.image_prompt: Holographic Earth rotating above futuristic circular table showing day-night terminator line clearly, one hemisphere lit golden by simulated sunlight the other in blue shadow, 23.5-degree axis tilt highlighted with holographic arrow, orbital path around Sun glowing in classroom space, futuristic INETUSX classroom, students watching, anime educational illustration.
jobs.prompt: The holographic Earth rotates above the classroom table showing the day-night terminator line sweeping across continents — one hemisphere bathed in golden sunlight, the other in blue shadow. PIX-Z gestures toward the planet's tilted axis, a holographic orbital path appears showing Earth's yearly journey around the Sun. Students watch the rotating animation with wonder. Anime style, dynamic motion, educational clarity.

jobs.label: Cena 20 — Conclusão: A Terra É Incrível e É Nossa!
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z diz: Vocês foram incríveis hoje! Aprenderam sobre o nascimento da Terra, suas quatro camadas, os números gigantes, as profundezas do oceano, como os continentes se formaram, onde estamos, as maiores montanhas, os polos e o giro do planeta! Cuidem bem desse lar incrível — porque ele cuida de nós há bilhões de anos!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style 2030 futuristic INETUSX classroom celebration — four teenage students standing around circular holographic table applauding joyfully, glowing blue-green rotating Earth hologram above casting warm light on their smiling faces, robot teacher with raised arms in celebration pose, vibrant triumphant warm lighting, detailed group illustration.

name: grecia

jobs.label: Cena 01 — A Aula Começa: Viagem à Grécia
jobs.audio_text: Hoje vamos fazer uma viagem no tempo! Vamos conhecer a Grécia Antiga e descobrir os incríveis legados que ela deixou para o mundo. Preparem-se, porque tudo que vocês conhecem hoje tem um pouco da Grécia!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style illustration, futuristic 2030 holographic classroom, interactive desks with glowing screens, holographic projection of ancient Greece map floating in center, blue and gold lighting, four teenage students seated, small floating robot, detailed sci-fi school interior, vibrant colors
jobs.prompt: Wide establishing shot of a futuristic holographic classroom in 2030. Four teenagers sit at interactive desks as holographic projections of ancient Greek maps and the Parthenon illuminate the room in blue and gold light. A small robot floats near the teacher's desk. The camera slowly dollies forward through the classroom. Anime style, warm ambient lighting mixed with blue holographic glow, detailed futuristic interior.

jobs.label: Cena 02 — Democracia: O Poder do Povo
jobs.audio_text: Lumi explica empolgada: A democracia nasceu em Atenas! Antes dos gregos, os reis decidiam tudo sozinhos. Mas em Atenas, os cidadãos se reuniam na Ágora e votavam nas leis. Cada pessoa tinha direito a uma voz. Foi a primeira vez na história que o povo decidiu seu próprio futuro!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style, futuristic classroom with holographic projection of ancient Greek agora, citizens voting in assembly, teenage girl standing and pointing at hologram, blue and gold ambient light, interactive desks, detailed 2030 school interior
jobs.prompt: Medium shot inside a futuristic holographic classroom. A teenage girl with an analytical expression stands up from her desk, gesturing toward a large holographic projection of the Athenian Agora with citizens voting. The hologram shows Greek citizens raising hands in an assembly. Blue and golden light bathes the scene. Camera slowly pushes in on the hologram. Anime style, detailed lighting, 2030 school setting.

jobs.label: Cena 03 — Filosofia: Sócrates, Platão e Aristóteles
jobs.audio_text: Caio observa fascinado: Sócrates ensinava fazendo perguntas, nunca dando respostas prontas. Seu aluno Platão criou a primeira universidade do mundo, a Academia. E Aristóteles, aluno de Platão, estudou tudo: lógica, biologia, política, ética. Esses três mudaram para sempre a forma como a humanidade pensa!

jobs.prompt: Wide shot of a holographic reconstruction of the Athenian Agora inside a futuristic classroom. A teenage boy watches intently, his eyes reflecting the golden holographic light. Camera pans slowly across the philosophers. Anime style, warm Mediterranean tones in the hologram, cool blue classroom ambient.

jobs.label: Cena 04 — Os Jogos Olímpicos
jobs.audio_text: Valen pula da cadeira: Os Jogos Olímpicos! Os gregos criaram os Jogos em Olímpia, em 776 antes de Cristo! Atletas de todas as cidades-estado competiam em corrida, luta, lançamento de disco e até corrida de bigas. Durante os jogos, todas as guerras paravam! Era a trégua sagrada. E até hoje temos as Olimpíadas por causa deles!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style, ancient Greek Olympic stadium at Olympia, athletes competing on sand track, stone bleachers, burning torches, temple of Zeus in background, holographic projection inside futuristic classroom, excited teenage girl standing, golden warm lighting, dynamic composition
jobs.prompt: Dynamic wide shot of a holographic ancient Olympic stadium of Olympia projected in a futuristic classroom. Holographic athletes compete in running, discus throwing and wrestling on a sand track. Stone bleachers surround the arena, torches burn brightly, a temple of Zeus stands in the background. A teenage girl jumps up excitedly from her desk. Camera tracks across the stadium action. Anime style, golden sunlight in the hologram, energetic mood.

jobs.label: Cena 05 — Teatro: A Arte de Contar Histórias
jobs.audio_text: PIX-Z projeta o teatro e explica: Os gregos inventaram o teatro como conhecemos! Criaram a tragédia e a comédia. Autores como Sófocles e Eurípides escreviam peças que faziam milhares de pessoas rirem e chorarem. Os atores usavam máscaras gigantes para que todos pudessem ver suas expressões, mesmo de longe. Cinema, novela, série — tudo começou aqui!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style, ancient Greek open-air amphitheater in mountainside, masked actors on circular stage, packed stone bleachers, mountains and sea in background, holographic projection in futuristic classroom, small floating robot nearby, dramatic golden lighting, cinematic wide angle
jobs.prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a holographic ancient Greek open-air theater projected in the classroom. A semicircular stone amphitheater built into a hillside, with masked actors performing on a circular stage. The audience fills the stone seats. Mountains and Mediterranean sea visible in the background. A small floating robot projects additional details. Camera slowly cranes up to reveal the full theater. Anime style, dramatic warm lighting, theatrical atmosphere.

jobs.label: Cena 06 — Matemática e Ciência: Tales, Pitágoras e Arquimedes
jobs.audio_text: Maya desenha triângulos no ar: A matemática que a gente estuda na escola veio dos gregos! Pitágoras descobriu a relação entre os lados do triângulo. Tales calculou a altura das pirâmides usando sombras. E Arquimedes? Descobriu como calcular o volume de objetos na banheira e saiu gritando Eureka! Geometria, física, astronomia — os gregos lançaram as bases de tudo!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style, futuristic classroom with floating holographic geometric shapes, Pythagorean theorem triangle, pi symbol, circles and equations glowing in blue and white, teenage girl interacting with holograms, 2030 school setting, intellectual mood, detailed sci-fi interior
jobs.prompt: Medium shot inside the futuristic holographic classroom. Holographic geometric shapes float in the air — triangles with labeled sides showing the Pythagorean theorem, circles with pi calculations, levers and pulleys. A teenage girl draws holographic triangles in the air with her finger, connecting the dots. Blue mathematical equations glow around her. Camera orbits slowly around the floating geometry. Anime style, electric blue and white holographic light, intellectual atmosphere.

jobs.label: Cena 07 — Medicina: Hipócrates, o Pai da Medicina
jobs.audio_text: Caio compara na tela: Hipócrates é considerado o pai da medicina! Antes dele, as pessoas achavam que doenças eram castigos dos deuses. Hipócrates disse: não, doenças têm causas naturais e precisam de tratamento científico. Ele criou o juramento que os médicos fazem até hoje. Toda vez que você vai ao médico, está vivendo um legado grego!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style, holographic projection of ancient Greek physician Hippocrates in white robes, medical diagrams and anatomical illustrations floating, futuristic classroom setting, teenage boy at interactive desk, warm gold and cool blue lighting, 2030 school interior, detailed composition
jobs.prompt: Medium shot in the holographic classroom. A holographic figure of Hippocrates appears, an elderly Greek man in white robes examining a patient. Medical symbols and anatomical holographic diagrams float nearby. A teenage boy reads from his interactive desk screen, comparing ancient and modern medicine side by side in holographic panels. Warm golden hologram contrasts with cool blue classroom. Camera slowly pushes in. Anime style, reverent tone, detailed projections.

jobs.label: Cena 08 — Arquitetura: Colunas que Sustentam o Mundo
jobs.audio_text: Lumi toca as colunas holográficas: Olhem o Partenon! Os gregos criaram três estilos de colunas: dórica, jônica e coríntia. Essas colunas estão em prédios do mundo inteiro até hoje — tribunais, museus, universidades, até o Congresso Nacional! A arquitetura grega simboliza ordem, beleza e proporção. Eles acreditavam que a beleza era uma forma de verdade.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style, holographic Acropolis of Athens with Parthenon in full glory, white marble Doric columns, blue Mediterranean sky, olive trees, rotating hologram showing column orders, futuristic classroom, teenage girl reaching toward hologram, golden majestic sunlight, epic composition
jobs.prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a magnificent holographic Acropolis of Athens projected in the classroom. The Parthenon stands in full glory with white marble Doric columns, under a bright blue Mediterranean sky. Olive trees surround the base. The hologram slowly rotates, showing different column orders — Doric, Ionic, Corinthian. A teenage girl reaches out to touch a holographic column. Camera tilts up along the columns. Anime style, majestic golden sunlight, awe-inspiring atmosphere.

jobs.label: Cena 09 — Mitologia e Literatura: Deuses e Heróis Eternos
jobs.audio_text: Valen exclama de olhos arregalados: A mitologia grega é incrível! Zeus, Atena, Poseidon, Hércules, a Odisseia de Ulisses! Homero escreveu a Ilíada e a Odisseia, as primeiras grandes obras da literatura ocidental. Esses mitos explicavam o mundo, ensinavam valores e inspiram filmes, livros e jogos até hoje. Os super-heróis que a gente ama? Os gregos inventaram primeiro!
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style, futuristic classroom filled with vivid holographic Greek mythology scenes, Zeus with lightning, Athena in armor, Odysseus on ship, Trojan Horse, four amazed teenagers surrounded by swirling holograms, dramatic multicolored lighting, epic mythological atmosphere, detailed composition
jobs.prompt: Dynamic wide shot inside the classroom. Spectacular holographic projections fill the room — Zeus throwing lightning bolts from Mount Olympus, Athena in armor, Odysseus sailing stormy seas, the Trojan Horse. The four teenagers watch in amazement, bathed in the multicolored holographic light. The holograms swirl around them dramatically. Camera rotates around the group as mythological scenes play out. Anime style, vivid dramatic colors, epic cinematic atmosphere.

jobs.label: Cena 10 — O Legado Vivo: A Grécia em Nós
jobs.audio_text: Lumi sorri para os amigos: Democracia, filosofia, teatro, olimpíadas, medicina, matemática, arquitetura, mitologia, literatura. Tudo isso nasceu na Grécia Antiga, há mais de dois mil anos, e continua vivo em cada parte do nosso mundo. Os gregos nos ensinaram a pensar, a questionar, a criar e a sonhar. O maior legado deles? Nos mostraram que o ser humano é capaz de coisas extraordinárias. E esse legado... está dentro de cada um de nós.
jobs.image_prompt: Anime style, futuristic classroom with epic holographic timeline showing Greek legacy flowing into modern world, columns becoming buildings, Olympic torch through centuries, four teenagers and small robot standing together in golden holographic light, triumphant hopeful mood, panoramic cinematic composition, 2030 school setting
jobs.prompt: Epic wide shot of the holographic classroom. A grand holographic timeline materializes showing Greek legacy flowing into the modern world — columns transforming into modern buildings, the Olympic torch passing through centuries, democratic assemblies becoming modern parliaments, Greek letters becoming scientific formulas. The four teenagers and the floating robot stand together, illuminated by the golden holographic glow, looking inspired. Camera slowly pulls back to reveal the full panoramic scene. Anime style, warm golden and blue light, triumphant hopeful atmosphere, cinematic finale.
